novel_features.name: Pipeline Velocity Analysis
novel_features.description: See how fast deals move through each pipeline stage with conversion rates and bottleneck detection.
novel_features.rationale: Requires historical deal stage snapshots that only exist together in the local store. HubSpot gates this behind Sales Hub Enterprise.

novel_features.name: Stale Deal Detection
novel_features.description: Find deals stuck in a stage with no recent engagement before they go cold.
novel_features.rationale: Requires joining deal stage history with last activity dates and owner data across the local store.

novel_features.name: Contact Engagement Scoring
novel_features.description: See engagement frequency and gaps for every contact across calls, emails, meetings, and tasks.
novel_features.rationale: Requires correlating all engagement types with contacts in the local store. HubSpot's native scoring is a paid add-on.

novel_features.name: Owner Workload Balance
novel_features.description: See which team members are overloaded with deals, tickets, and overdue tasks before assigning more.
novel_features.rationale: Requires cross-entity joins across deals, tickets, and tasks by owner that no single API call can produce.

novel_features.name: Association Graph Traversal
novel_features.description: See the full relationship web for any CRM record: contact to company to deals to tickets to engagements.
novel_features.rationale: Requires recursive association lookups stored locally. No existing tool does multi-hop graph traversal.

novel_features.name: Pipeline Forecast
novel_features.description: Get weighted pipeline projections using your actual historical close rates per stage.
novel_features.rationale: Requires deals and historical conversion data in the local store. HubSpot's Forecasts API requires a paid tier.

novel_features.name: Duplicate Detection
novel_features.description: Find likely duplicate contacts by fuzzy matching on name, email, and company.
novel_features.rationale: Requires FTS5 across contact fields in the local store. HubSpot gates dedup behind Operations Hub.

novel_features.name: Deal Coverage Analysis
novel_features.description: Find open deals where associated contacts have no recent engagement.
novel_features.rationale: Requires joining deals with associated contacts and engagement history in the local store.
